allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; ['expo-sharing','expo-file-system','expo-document-picker'].forEach\(k => console.log\(k + ': ' + \(deps[k] || 'NOT INSTALLED'\)\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('expo-notifications:', p.dependencies['expo-notifications'] || 'NOT INSTALLED'\)")
